label: Hediff giver set
description: Defines a named collection of HediffGiver entries that are applied together to pawns with a matching race.

hediffGivers.label: Hediff givers
hediffGivers.description: List of hediff givers applied to pawns using this set. Each entry selects a giver class via the Class attribute.

new-hediff-giver-set.label: New hediff giver set
new-hediff-giver-set.description: Blank hediff giver set with an empty givers list.
